\begin{array}{l} P (X = x _ {i}) \approx P (x _ {i} \leq X \leq x _ {i} + \Delta x) = P (X \leq x _ {i} + \Delta x) - P (X \leq x _ {i}) = \\ F (x _ {i} + \Delta x) - F (x _ {i}) = F ^ {\prime} (\xi) \cdot \Delta x = f (\xi) \cdot \Delta x \approx f (x _ {i}) \Delta x \\ \end{array}
注: p不一定需要是概率

。根据以上概率分布抽取 100 个样本。
